guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 1. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_m: Point to the big M and say: mmmmmm. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_s: Now point to the big S and say: ssssss.

parent_story: Sam the cat sat on a map. Sam said: Mmm, I love this warm map! The sun is shining.
